mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM help_requests WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE help_requests SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE help_requests SET volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}, volunteer_name = #{volunteerName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE help_requests SET status = 'cancelled', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM help_requests
AND status = #{status}

SELECT * FROM help_requests
AND status = 'pending'
AND status IN ('assigned', 'in-progress')
AND status != 'cancelled'
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM help_requests
AND status = 'pending'
AND status IN ('assigned', 'in-progress')
AND status != 'cancelled'
SELECT * FROM help_requests WHERE status = 'pending' AND latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT * FROM help_requests WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
